name: Command Protocol
tagline: Wage war. Build empires. Control the field.
description:
Command Protocol is a tactical real-time strategy game set in a near-future world fractured by corporate warfare and armed rebellion. Players command elite military forces or join the decentralized Rebel Movement to seize control of strategic nodes across a devastated globe.

Build bases, deploy specialized units, research advanced weaponry, and outmaneuver your enemies through superior strategy. Every decision carries weight. Every resource matters. Victory belongs to the most disciplined commander.
